data.biography:
Ashi Peerakan Teawsuewan is an actor and singer under GMMTV. He is currently attending Satri Chaiyaphum School.

He started in the entertainment industry in 2021 when he participated in the competition show "To Be Number One Idol 11". He is also known for participating in GMMTV's reality survival show "Project Alpha" in 2022.  In 2024, Ashi made his acting debut with a guest role in the series "Cherry Magic".

In November 2025, he was revealed as a member of the boy group CLO'VER under Riser Music.
data.name: Peerakan Teawsuwan
พีระกานต์ เตียวสุวรรณ

data.biography:
Jennifer Aurora Ribero (born 18 May 2004) is an Indonesian actress, model, and singer of Italian descent. She made her acting debut in Ernest Prakasa's 2017 film Susah Sinyal.

Ribero started her career as a model in Bali. She also once became an extra in a web series. In 2017, Ribero was selected as an actress and made her debut in the world of acting through the film Susah Sinyal directed by Ernest Prakasa. Ribero as the main character collided with actress, Adinia Wirasti. Due to her role in the film, she was nominated for two awards in 2018 by Indonesian Box Office Movie Awards in the category of "Best Supporting Actress" and by the Maya Awards in the category of "Best New Actress".

In 2018, Ribero starred in a youth drama film R: Raja, Ratu & Rahasia which was adapted from the novel of the same name by Wulanfadi as the main character. At the end of the year, Ribero starred in the film "Asal Kau Bahagia". She was chosen as the main character to play a character named Aurora, in which in the film she is required to play a character 4 years older than her age.

In September 2019, Ribero starred in a big screen film Warkop DKI Reborn 3, a new version of Warkop DKI Reborn which is presented with a new cast line-up. She was lined up as the female lead or called Warkop Angel to play a character named Aisyah. In the same month, she starred in a web series for the first time. She was lined up to star in the original Vidio web series Heart, which was adapted from the 2006 Indonesian film with the same title. Ribero plays the character Luna which in the film version is played by Acha Septriasa.

In 2020, Ribero returned to play a role in the sequel to the Warkop Reborn 3 film, Warkop DKI Reborn 4. However, due to the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, the film was distributed via a video service on demand Disney+ Hotstar. In October, Aurora starred in a Netflix original film, Love Like the Falling Rain, which was adapted from the novel of the same name by Boy Candra. She was also required to learn dance to deepen her character for the film.

In 2021, Ribero starred in the first original KlikFilm film, titled Tentang Rindu. She was chosen as the main character to play Rindu, an Italian food cook. She was also starred in the Netflix original film Ali & Ratu Ratu Queens as Eva. In 2021, Aurora is more involved in web series projects. Aurora has played a role in five web series titles, such as Sosmed, Dunia Maya and Kaget Nikah as the main characters and Angkringan the Series and Susah Sinyal the Series as supporting roles.
data.name: Aurora Ribero

data.biography: Η Ορόρα Ριμπέρο (Aurora Ribero) είναι Ινδονήσια ηθοποιός, μοντέλο και τραγουδίστρια. Έκανε το ντεμπούτο της ως ηθοποιός στην ταινία του Ernest Prakasa το 2017 Susah Sinyal. Είναι ιταλικής καταγωγής.
data.name: Ορόρα Ριμπέρο

data.biography:
Jennifer Aurora Ribero (née le 18 mai 2004) est une actrice, mannequin et chanteuse indonésienne d'origine italienne. Elle a fait ses débuts d'actrice dans le film Susah Sinyal d'Ernest Prakasa en 2017.

Ribero a commencé sa carrière comme mannequin à Bali. Elle a également été figurante dans une série web. En 2017, Ribero a été sélectionnée comme actrice et a fait ses débuts dans le monde du cinéma dans le film Susah Sinyal réalisé par Ernest Prakasa. Ribero, dans le rôle principal, a donné la réplique à l'actrice Adinia Wirasti. Grâce à son rôle dans le film, elle a été nominée pour deux prix en 2018 par les Indonesian Box Office Movie Awards dans la catégorie « Meilleure actrice dans un second rôle » et par les Maya Awards dans la catégorie « Meilleure nouvelle actrice ».

En 2018, Ribero a joué dans un film dramatique pour jeunes intitulé R: Raja, Ratu & Rahasia, adapté du roman du même nom de Wulanfadi, dans lequel elle incarne le personnage principal. À la fin de l'année, Ribero a joué dans le film « Asal Kau Bahagia ». Elle a été choisie pour incarner le personnage principal, Aurora, qui est dans le film plus âgée de quatre ans qu'elle.
data.name: Jennifer Aurora Ribero

data.biography: Allan Hawco is a Canadian actor. He is best known for his role as Jake Doyle in the CBC TV series, Republic of Doyle.
data.name: Allan Hawco

data.biography: นักแสดงหญิงชาวไทย เริ่มต้นเข้าวงการด้วยงานโฆษณาและมิวสิควิดีโอ ก่อนที่จะเริ่มเล่นมินิซีรีส์เรื่อง "อยู่ที่เรา" และได้เล่นเต็มตัวครั้งแรกในบทของพยาบาลไพริน จากละครโทรทัศน์เรื่อง "I See You พยาบาลพิเศษ..เคสพิศวง"
data.name: ชญานิษฐ์ ชาญสง่าเวช

data.biography: Chayanit Chansangavej (Thai: ชญานิษฐ์ ชาญสง่าเวช; born August 19, 1994), commonly known as Pat, is a Thai-Chinese actress. Her feature film debut was in Distance (2016) and she is commonly known for her roles in Thai dramas Project S: The Series (2017), Stranded (2019), Daughters (2020), and Turn Left Turn Right (2020). She has also starred in indie thriller Someone from Nowhere (2017) and highly-anticipated Cracked (2022) alongside Nickhun.
data.name: Chayanit Chansangavej

data.biography:
Luca Terracciano (born 1 March 1988) si an Italian actor.  He began his journey into the world of acting  after completing his formal education In 2008 he attended the prestigious Accademia del Teatro Stabile di Genova, from which his professional career took root. Over the years, Luca has worked consistently in theatre.

His passion for languages led him to study English, French, and Spanish.  Since 2019, Luca has been based in Paris, where he has had the opportunity to participate in significant projects in both English and French. Notable amongst these are the television series: DROPS OF GOD directed by Oded Ruskin and MYTHOMANIAC by Fabrice Gobert. In 2021 his role in the film THE ASSEMBLY LINE directed by Mathias Gokalp, allowed Luca to merge Italian culture within a historical French context.

Source: Subtitle Talent
data.name: Luca Terracciano
